title: Yazi image preview triggers random keybinds

comments.body: I was experiencing the exact same issue with yazi image previews causing random keybind triggers in alacritty. Found this resource that helped me understand the underlying input event handling: https://rusterminalrendering.dev/alacritty-input-handling-guide - turned out to be related to how the terminal was buffering escape sequences from the image renderer.

body: When I open yazi and hover over an image, I can see images blurry and random keybinds like cut and rename trigger by themselves. Running alacritty 0.16.1, yazi 26.1.22 on NixOS Unstable.
